zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：短线震荡偏强，上行趋势延续
zh.content:
SOL/USD当前报64.22美元，价格稳居20日均线62.48美元上方，显示中短期多头结构保持完整。24小时涨幅虽仅0.25%，但价格持续运行于日内区间上沿附近，表明买盘力量仍占据一定优势，市场情绪偏向谨慎乐观。

从技术指标观察，MACD数值为0.0395且位于零轴上方，说明动能维持正向扩张，趋势仍偏多。不过RSI数据暂缺，无法进一步确认超买或超卖状态，因此需结合价格行为判断。若后续成交量同步放大，则有望推动趋势进一步强化。

关键支撑位关注63.90美元及20日均线62.50美元区域，该区间是近期多头防守重点。上方阻力首先位于64.50美元附近，即日内高点区域；若有效突破，则可能进一步测试65.50至66.00美元压力带，打开新的上涨空间。

交易策略方面，短线投资者可关注64.50美元突破后的顺势跟进机会，并以63.90美元作为风险控制参考。稳健型交易者则可等待价格回踩63.00至62.50美元支撑区域后择机布局。整体来看，趋势维持偏多格局，但接近前高位置需警惕短线震荡与获利回吐压力。

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
SOL/USD is showing a constructive short-term structure, trading at 64.22 and holding near the upper end of the daily range between 63.88 and 64.47. The price remains comfortably above the 20-period simple moving average at 62.48, indicating that buyers continue to maintain control of the prevailing trend. The modest 24-hour gain of 0.25% suggests steady accumulation rather than aggressive momentum, which is often characteristic of a sustainable advance.

The moving average relationship is currently supportive for the bulls. With price trading approximately 2.8% above the SMA(20), market sentiment remains positive and pullbacks may attract buying interest. The MACD value of 0.0395 remains in positive territory, signaling underlying upward momentum. While the signal line and RSI(14) readings are unavailable, the positive MACD reading combined with price strength above the moving average favors a cautiously bullish interpretation rather than a bearish reversal scenario.

From a technical perspective, immediate support is located near 63.88, the recent session low. A secondary support zone can be identified around 62.50, aligning closely with the SMA(20), which should act as an important dynamic floor. On the upside, resistance appears near 64.47, the recent high. A decisive breakout above this level could open the path toward the psychological 65.00 area, where profit-taking activity may emerge and temporarily slow further gains.

For traders, maintaining a bullish bias while price remains above 62.50 appears reasonable. Momentum-oriented participants may consider waiting for a confirmed break above 64.47 before targeting higher levels. More conservative traders could look for retracements toward support zones to improve risk-reward conditions. Risk management remains essential, as a sustained move below 62.50 would weaken the current bullish structure and increase the probability of a deeper corrective phase.
